2188440.name: Tales of Agaris - The Legendary Rion
2188440.description:
Additional content from the trilogy. It tells a part of the story of Rion, a playable character, but not mandatory in the base games.



Premisse
RPG elements kept in this game, such as stopping the battle to heal yourself using a potion (if possible), random battles and event battles in the game at different times, and much more that a RPG game has mixing with a linear battle system, where you can move freely in the battles where the action takes place in real time.


Features
1 - Possibility to change the commands of abilities that Rion has on his stock;
2 - Possibility to control another ally within the battles;
3 - Possibility of infinite loops that will make you reach absurd levels of strength.


This game counts the story of Rion. A playable character of the base game. It explains what happened to him at important moments of the story of Aqala, such as the story of humanity of this universe hundreds of years ago.

Breaking the RPG Maker's limits on its default turn-based battle. Using the max of what this engine can do.
